title: urostigma prolixum
intro: Urostigma prolixum, also known as the Indian staff tree or staff plant, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Urostigma prolixum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Urostigma prolixum is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
